prompt: Write a 300-word customer advisory board (CAB) charter for openpatent.ai. Cover: (1) the 9-seat composition — 3 IP boutique partners, 3 AI startup CTOs/founders, 2 gov/defense TTO directors, 1 independent IP-attorney luminary, (2) the 3 nomination criteria — (a) currently paying ≥$999/mo, (b) submitted ≥15 disclosures in the last 90 days, (c) nominated by an existing CAB member or by a founding-team vote, (3) the 4 deliverables per year — (a) 2 in-person summits (1 at the London sovereign temple, 1 at the SF satellite), (b) 4 quarterly 90-min virtual roundtables, (c) 1 written 'state of the hive' report co-authored with the founders, (d) 1 product-vote where the CAB picks the next 6 features from a top-12 shortlist, (4) the 5 reserved powers — (a) pre-release product feedback (NDA-gated), (b) pricing-tier sanity check, (c) policy-positioning review, (d) 22/33 BFT council candidate nomination, (e) 1 vote on the annual Hive Roadmap, (5) the compensation — $0 cash, 0.5% options vesting over 2yrs + lifetime Sovereign tier ($4,999/mo equivalent), (6) the meeting cadence — kickoff Q1 2027, first summit June 2027 London, (7) the off-boarding — 2 consecutive missed meetings = replaced. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {composition:[4 strings], nomination_criteria:[3 strings], deliverables:[4 strings], reserved_powers:[5 strings], compensation:[2 strings], cadence:[2 strings], off_boarding:string}.
